title: Boat HUD (Extended)
body:
## Overview
Boat HUD is a client-side mod for Fabric that shows all important info for ice boat racers

![Overview](https://github.com/jewtvet/boathud_extended/blob/main/1.gif?raw=true)

### Indicators
- Speed
- Keystrokes 
- Drift angle
- G Forces
- Ping
- FPS

### Suggestions & Feedback
Do you have an idea for a new feature or improvements for existing features? Or maybe you found some bugs? Please create the issue on github and let me know

## Credits
Based on the [BoatHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/boathud) by Hibi and [SBoatHud](https://gitlab.com/5h1zuy4/sboathud) by Shizuya
